response.justification: The candidate has experience with a wide range of technologies and has worked on various projects, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis and optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Experience with diverse programming languages and technologies
Background in developing complex software systems
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience with AI/deep-learning workloads
Not directly related to cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization
